title: hieracium pannosum subsp. epiglossophyllum
intro: Hieracium pannosum subsp. epiglossophyllum, also known as the woolly hawk's-beard or yellow hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium pannosum subsp. epiglossophyllum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. Hieracium pannosum subsp. epiglossophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
